subject: C5: Add _schema_version to forecast_results.json
description: Top-level _schema_version field in forecast_results.json + validation_results.json. Date-string (e.g. "2026.05.23"). Add load-time validation that warns when version differs from current code version. Prevents silently re-analyzing stale JSONs after rule semantics change.
activeForm: Adding schema version to output JSONs
